ignored_messages: Please move some or all players to one of the teams and try again.
All of the players are in the Waiting or Spectators area.
welcome_message: Welcome! Drag yourself into Red & click 'Join Game'
end_message: GG. Loading next map. Please return to lobby.
help_message: Commands: HELP, SETTINGS, MAP, INFO <query>, LAUNCHNEW <preset> (<map_id>), REGION east/central/west/eu/oce
moderate_message:
Giving {sender} temporary leader. This is strictly for moderation, not room management.
Perform any necessary actions then immediately give leader back to the bot.

Psssst... Hey you... yeah you.
Think about this: Out of everyone you know, whos most likely to enjoy trying out gravity maps?
Please message them a link to this group.
TP pubs dead? This lobby is open 24/7, and often active late at night!
Gravity League TagPro has flexible timing, your team can run the maps when it works best for you!
If you want a new map go back to group and Ill load a fresh one!
This lobby is open 24/7, but the best time to join is 10PM Eastern.

The bot cycles through maps from this spreadsheet:
docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1OnuTCekHKCD91W39jXBG4uveTCCyMxf9Ofead43MMCU
There are currently {map_count} maps in rotation!
Map too hard? "SETTINGS difficulty 1 2.9"  Too easy? "SETTINGS difficulty 4 7"

Use "SETTINGS category yourcategory" to play specific map types!
Categories include buddy, mars, non-grav, race, unlimited, tower, and more!
Please file bug reports and feature requests in the #bug-reports-and-suggestions room in discord.gg/8rmRgxqCDv
Made or found a new map you'd like to see in rotation? Share it with us in discord.gg/8rmRgxqCDv

World records are automatically updated for games which take place in this group.
If your record was in a different group, you can submit a link to #wr-submissions in discord.gg/8rmRgxqCDv
or simply say "MEMO <replay uuid here>"
You can see all the bots commands by saying "HELP"
Hey guys, you should check out the world records webpage: bambitp.github.io/GLTP/
The first person falsely accused for cheating on a WR was 3, on July 28th, 2025.

Tip: Don't like a users chat? Click their name to mute. Players waoting? Ask a mod to ban.
Group policy not to your liking? Poaching is 100% allowed, invite players in this group to a new one.
Tip: **Hold up** for higher / floating jump, **Hold down** to short jump
Tip: You can use the space bar to avoid AFK disconnecting

Tip: Falling through a one-tile passage between a wall and a green gate?
**Hold** up, slowly approach, and hug the wall while falling off.
Tip: Need to jump fewer than 5 tiles? hold down before you **tap** jump
Tip: You can get MAXIMUM jumping height with a quick double tap, holding up on the 2nd jump.
Tip: Gravity is quite hard at first, but after a few dozen games you'll be able to move like the pros.

Why is it dangerous to play tagpro while pooping?
Because tp runs out after 20 seconds.

Why are honest Zoomers so bad at tagpro?
Because they aint even cappin.

Why did the tagpro player go to jail?
Because he was an offender who wouldn't stop grabbing
Fun fact: When you play on the Atlanta server you don't get "popped", you get "coked"
Lore: Grav once asked BartimaeusJr in a pub if he made BartJrs Gravity Challenge. BartimaeusJr denied it
Lore: GLTPs roots lie with Dad and Madoka, the architects of its destiny, whose whispered ambitions shaped its foundation

Lore: On March third 2025, SB Army SB **destroyed** the TP refresh record,
accumulating over 6,000 refreshes in a game
Lore: FWO and Unity hold the current duo WR for most pops in one game with 20,000 pops
Lore: FWO holds the current solo WR for most pops in one game with 12,000 pops

Lore: Alpha's first tagpro gravity map, "Saltpeter" was named by her sister, "sisball".
The name comes from their Chicken in the 2016 farming sim "Stardew Valley".
Sisball enjoyed the farming aspects of the game, Alpha felt fishing was the only fun aspect of the game
